reviews.comment:
Un desastre, no está al nivel requerido por el ACA, 3/4 de hora para cargar, los baños sucios , todo mal. Soy socio, acá no paro más!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, it's not up to the standard required by the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). It takes 45 minutes to fill up, the bathrooms are filthy, everything's wrong. I'm a member, I'm not stopping here anymore!

reviews.comment:
Atención y buen servicio..

Volvimos despues de unos años, sigue igual. Recomendable, espacio verde pàra descansar, un shop completo y cómodo. y todo muy limpio y ordenado...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention.

We returned after a few years, and it's still the same. Highly recommended. A green space to relax, a well-stocked and comfortable shop, and everything very clean and tidy.
